summary: The page reproduces all 11 sections in correct order with EDS signature classes present and most text faithful, but the hero banner is critically broken — the patient image, headline, TO-DAY LIST logo, CTA and description are all missing in the render, leaving only a flat gradient bar. Several header/video icons are missing, card-2 image sizing is wrong, ISI font sizes/colors are off, and multiple image x-positions are misaligned.

issues.expected: Patient image (image-39), headline 'Put curing hepatitis C on your', TO-DAY LIST logo, 'Why EPCLUSA?' CTA with arrow, and description visible inside a 1070x461 rounded hero
issues.actual: Only a thin gradient bar renders; the hero image and all overlaid content are missing/collapsed (worst mismatch region 75-98%)
issues.fix: Ensure .ep-hero-img loads and the absolute-positioned .ep-hero-content sits over a sized image; the hero is collapsing to near-zero height

issues.expected: Two additional 12x12 export SVG icons (export_...5107.svg, export_...5111.svg) on the top nav links
issues.actual: Only one export icon referenced via CSS background; the other two are missing
issues.fix: Add the two missing export SVG icons to the appropriate top-link items

issues.expected: Play button (svg 44x24), mute button (20x20), settings (20x20), fullscreen (20x20) and '01:00' / 'Play' controls overlaid on the poster
issues.actual: No control SVGs rendered; only the poster image shows, no play/mute/settings/fullscreen icons or timestamp
issues.fix: Add the four video control SVGs and the '01:00' timestamp/Play label over the poster
Constrain card-2 image dimensions to design values
Set ISI text to 15px and #000000 per spec

issues.expected: 'What is EPCLUSA?' heading at font-weight 700 and 'Hepatitis B virus reactivation' content at 700/15px
issues.actual: font-weight 400 measured on some headings; sizes 18-18.3px
issues.fix: Apply correct bold weights and font sizes to RTF headings/list items
Align logo to the content column (x≈155px)
Left-align the footer logo to x≈275px

issues.expected: magnify x≈314, rectangle images x≈225/799, button x≈877
issues.fix: Adjust horizontal alignment of card-2 images/icons/button

issues.actual: Render top bar is dark grey/near-black
issues.fix: Verify the secondary-nav background renders as #50758A not a dark fallback

issues.expected: Card titles use teal #50758A-consistent design tokens/scale
issues.actual: Uses raw hex values (#50758A, #06B7AB) which lack tokens — acceptable but verify weights/sizes match
issues.fix: No token exists for these teals; confirm font sizes/weights match design
